titleStmt.title: SII 27.90: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 90. (A.R. No. 247 of 1931-32.) HĀNĒHAḶḶI, (same as Mūḍakēri), UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the compound of the house of Lakshmīnārāyaṇa-śāstri near the Sōmanātha temple.
This is dated Kali 4516, Śaka [1336], Jaya, Māgha śu. 1, Saturday corresponding to 1415 A.D., January 12.
It records gifts of lands and house sites by Chidāḍi Sōvaṇṇa-seṭṭi for feeding 27 brāhmaṇas daily in the maṭha got built by him in the temple of Sōmanātha. The record is damaged and details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūla
staṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa dēvarāya mahārāya
mahārāyaru prithvīrājyaṁ geyyali dēvoḍeyaru bārakūra rājya pa The expression mahārāyaru here is redundant.
va kali varuśa 4516 neya voḷaguḷa śālivāhana śakava 1336 neya
vartamāna jaya saṁvatsarada māgha śu 1 śanivāradalu mūṟu kēriya
haṁguḷa baḷiya cidāḍi sōmaṁṇna seṭṭiyaru śrī sōmanātha dēvara saṁnidhiyali
maṭhavanū kaṭṭisi yippattayēḷu maṁdi brāhmaṇa bhōjanake tāmāḍida dharmmakke biṭṭa brahma
dāyada mūlada bāḷina catussīmeya vivara Alatāroḷage haṁcageya
neyali baṁda mūlada bāḷu mūḍalu hiriya
damaged
brahmadāyada mūlada bāḷu A bāḷa catussīmeya vivara
da pāḷu mūḍalu dēvasvagōviṁda sahasrana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu gōviṁda
dēvaru gōpāḷadēva hoḷa kṛṣṇahoḷa hoḷeya kareya mādhava hoḷa yavarugaḷa gaḍiyaṁdaṁ baḍaga
lu paḍuvalu hoḷiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu sāliṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeyoḷaguḷa ma
ne mane ṭhāu keṟi sahitavāgi bayalu bittu bede gaṇagilu yi khaṁḍugada
Aṁṇa haṁḍeya magana gaddeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu vōḍinaḍava yiṁ baḍagalu paḍu
valu gōviṁda sahasrana gaddeyiṁdaṁ mūḍu baḍagalu riya nāleyiṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī
catussīmeyoḷaguḷa gadde mattaṁ muṁḍagana keṟiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu gō hiliya ho
la gadde 1 saṁṇakāra mattaṁ bayaloḷagaṇa gadde 1 hittila gadde 1 Aṁtu gadde
1 Aṁtu sarūpa 1 bittuva bedega yi khaṁḍugadalu 16
haṁḍeyada manemane ṭhāu kaṇake 2 Aṁttu baḷiya gadde bittuva bedegaṇagilu
ṁḍugadalu mūḍe 25 maneṭhāu 3 keṟi paura paḷiya Uppi sahitavāgi bāḷiṁ
darasiṁge teṟuva teṟu mūḍe 16 nū yi bāḷiṁge
modalāgi baṁdu thā
yillade yi maṭhakke kālakālakke na varisaṁ prati mūḍe 1
dalu nāgaṁḍugadalu Akki ya yaṁbhattu mūḍe Akkiyanū varuṣaṁ prati naḍasi
bahanu . mattaṁ haṁdāḍi yoḷagaṇa baṁda brahmadāyada
ha ṇa kakkiya gadde 1 kaṁ mūḍe kālada gadde 1 kaṁ
bāgila gadde 1 kaṁ mūḍe bāgila gadde 1 kaṁ mū hiriya hosa gadde 1 kaṁ mūḍe
10 ma ṇa gade 1 huḷi 1 saha mū 4 Aṁtugadde 6 nāgaṁḍugadalu bittuva be
de gaṇagilu mūḍe 27 Ā bāḷiṁge Arasiṁge teṟuva kaṭṭuṁdeṟiga 12 ḍakaḷaci śuddhavāgi ba
nageḍu baḻageḍiṁde kaṁṇa subburugeṟi yiṁtī yibbarū nāyaru mūlavāgi
naḍasuva Akki pratimūḍe 1 kaṁ hāne 40 ṟa lekadalu Akkiyamū 50 vattaṁ
ya bittuva nāyara mūlada catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu maṁṇa guḍḍe
yavara dāriyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu keṟiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu
na yettida Agaḷiṁdaṁ mūḍagalu baḍagalu guḍḍe teṁkalu yiṁtī ca
tussīmeyoḷaguḷḷa manemane ṭhāu keṟi mekke hakkalu sahitavāgi bittuva bedega
ṇagilu nāgaṁḍugada mūḍe 1 bāḷiṁge kaṭuṁdeṟu ga 1
Ade maṭhakke naḍasuva Akki mū 30 ga Ubhayaṁ
nāgaṁḍugadalū Akkiya mūḍe 60 nū naḍasi baharu . mattaṁ gaḍiyiṁ
beṭṭina bāḷu mane mane ṭhāu gadde 2 kkaṁ naḍasuva Akki mūḍe 5 mattaṁ
yamaga kuṁdeyaseṭṭi taṁtrāḍiyoḷage koṁḍa
ya vivara mūḍalu sōmayadēvara
ṭiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu tuḷuviya seṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu paḍuvalu hādiyiṁ
gūḍara gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catussīmeyoḷaguḷa makka bittuva bede gaṇagilu
gaṁḍugadalu mūḍe 6 Alli Uḷa mane mane ṭhāu
makke mara phalasahitavāgi mu 20 bayala bituva gade mūḍalu gōviṁda
daṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu gōviṁda ya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu gōviṁ
ḷa bayala gade 2 kkaṁ bittuva bedegaṇagilu nāgaṁḍugadalu mūḍe 6 Ubhayaṁ
bāḷiṁge kaṭṭuṁdeṟu muṁḍāmuṁḍiyāgi ga 480 . I bāḷi
lu sahitavāgi yi bāḷiṁguḷa gēṇi I bāḷanu śivagāḷi nāyaru
kālakālakke maṭhakke naḍasuva gēṇiya Akkiya mūḍe rada hu
yāgi nilikeyali nāgaṁḍugadalu Akkiyamūḍe 20 Akṣaradalu Akkiyamūḍe yippattu I
Akkiyanu bānagēḍu baṟagēḍillade kālakālakke tappade naḍasi bahanu . mattaṁ
barasida daḍema haṁḍeya bageya naṁma mūlada bāḷina Amu 80 naḍaca
ṭiṁge yiṭakoṁḍu kōṭa heci naḍava Akki varuśaṁ prati mū 25 Ubhayaṁ Akki mu 105 mūḍe
yakkiyanū naḍasuvaru . mattaṁ Alatāra Oḷagaṇa Adūriyoḷage ba seṭṭiya ka
yyali mūlavakoṁḍa bāḷa catusīmeya vivara sāliṁ paḍuvalu hedāriyaṁ baḍagalu
lana maneya bāgila gaddeyiṁ mūḍalu ba sāliṁ teṁkalu Iṁtī catusīmeyaguḷa baya
lu bittuva bedegaṇagilu nāghaṁḍugadalu 3 makke bittuva bedegaṇagilu
catusīmeya voḷaguḷa mane ṭhāu makke niḍilu sahavāgi
ṁṇa seṭṭiya Akṣaredalu
1. Two more lines after this are illegible.
Digital edition of SII 27.90 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
